title: settings — Eloquent observers
description: One observer on SettingValue: state-machine + dual-write trigger + sensitive-field masking.

handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `set_` + resolve created_by from Sanctum
creating → refuse when scope_type != 'system' AND scope_id IS NULL
creating → refuse when parent (scope, group, name) is is_locked=true at a higher scope
creating → propagate is_sensitive from SettingField definition (via SettingsRegistry lookup)
creating / updating → apply EncryptedSensitiveSettingCast when field.sensitive AND config('settings.encrypt_sensitive_at_rest') AND encrypted_at_rest not already true
updated (payload changed) → fire SettingsChangeEvent (afterCommit) with old + new + scope
deleted → fire SettingsChangeEvent with new_value=null (cleared override)
